plugin_desc: Panduit G5 iPDU and intelligent PDU network-service SNMP baseline child template for devices under Panduit PEN 19536. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current MIB facts confirm PDU identity, input phase or line, outlet, temperature and humidity probe, rack access, HID and alarm tables, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, fan or power-health scalar semantics, so private health and PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
